message:
🔧 Fix statusLine validation - add required type field - v2.5.0-alpha.134

Fixes Claude Code settings validation error:
- Added "type": "command" to statusLine configuration
- Updated both settings.json template and enhanced-templates.js fallback
- StatusLine now validates correctly in Claude Code

🧠 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
